description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a sprawling, horizontal layout and a flat roof. The structure features a large double garage with a wide driveway, a secondary driveway leading to a side entrance, and multiple interconnected rooms visible through open floor plans. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with minimalistic landscaping including a strip of greenery along one driveway. Large windows and sliding glass doors are present, especially at the rear, providing ample natural light and access to outdoor spaces. The house's design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and functional living areas, typical of contemporary suburban homes.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, double garage, and open floor plan, finished in light gray and white with minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main driveway, and a side driveway with a strip of greenery.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the open living spaces, large windows, and backyard access.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the extended layout, multiple rooms, and minimal window placement on this facade.
description_view_3: Back view with a clear look at the flat roof, rear garage wall, and backyard landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door, no porch, and direct access from the driveway with minimal decorative elements.
